parents.subject: LU-19506 nodemap: appended filesets must consider alt filesets

commit.subject: LU-19587 tests: sanity/127e to drop cache
commit.message:
LU-19587 tests: sanity/127e to drop cache

write dirty data left from preceeding tests so stats in 127e
are generated by own writes only

Fixes: d67cf23fb18 ("LU-18993 osc: Add IO RPC latency statistics by size")
Test-Parameters: env=ONLY=127 testlist=sanity,sanity,sanity
Test-Parameters: env=ONLY=127 testlist=sanity,sanity,sanity
Test-Parameters: env=ONLY=127 testlist=sanity,sanity,sanity
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ie277f725bf91390ee524dbb5003de899795f51ed
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62473
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
